items.bullet: Lansing City Council opens public hearing tonight on 182-day data center moratorium after Deep Green 24 MW proposal withdrawal.
Lansing hearing July 13 on 182-day data center moratorium after Deep Green's $120M downtown proposal with heat-reuse deal was withdrawn amid resident concerns over energy and water
Saline Township board to address Industrial Facilities Tax Exemption application for Related Digital data center project at July 8 meeting.
